title: selaginella cupressina
intro: Selaginella cupressina, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of ancient plant species that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is widely distributed across tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections. The health benefits of Selaginella cupressina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
